checks.cmd: python3 -m py_compile scripts/workflow_validate.py scripts/workflow_validate_core.py scripts/workflow_checks.py scripts/workflow_checks_core.py scripts/workflow_detect.py scripts/workflow_utils.py scripts/workflow_render.py scripts/workflow_hooks.py scripts/workflow_memory.py
checks.name: lint

patternCompliance.detail: All 11 functions verified unused via grep across codebase before removal
Archive moves used git mv to preserve file history
discuss → plan → implement → review — correct lifecycle
Issues closed via CLI (leader role), not by worker agents

principleNotes: Surgical Changes (2/2): only planned files touched, no drive-by refactors
Simplicity First (2/2): pure deletion, no new abstractions introduced
Goal-Driven Execution (2/2): every removal verified by grep before planning, imports verified after execution
Correctness (2/2): all dead functions verified unused; kept exports confirmed used externally
Security (2/2): no new code, only deletions and renames
Contract Compliance (2/2): full CONTEXT → PLAN → SUMMARY chain for both plans
Test Coverage (2/2): dead code removal requires no new tests; import verification sufficient

commits.message: refactor(memory): remove 11 dead function wrappers and outdated comments
docs(planning): add Plan 02 summary for workflow-dead-code-cleanup
